title: Stay the Course
content: Every crash in history has been followed by recovery. Every. Single. One. I've been through a few myself - including ones that weren't about money. The key is always the same: stay the course.
ssml_content: Every crash in history has been followed by recovery. Every. Single. One. <break time="200ms"/>I've been through a few myself - including ones that weren't about money. The key is always the same: stay the course.
teaching_point: Perseverance through difficulty leads to recovery
